title: Which sports does WagerProof cover?
description: A breakdown of the sports leagues and bet types WagerProof currently supports.

content.text: WagerProof currently covers four major sports leagues with model-generated predictions and analytics.
Full game predictions with spread, moneyline, and totals. Includes EPA-based model inputs, weather data for outdoor games, and public betting labels. Season runs September through February.
Model predictions for FBS college football matchups. Includes spread, moneyline, and totals predictions with weekly model updates. Season runs August through January.

The richest data set -- includes team ratings, last-3 and last-5 game trends, win streaks, ATS performance, consistency scores, and luck metrics. Predictions available for spread, moneyline, and totals. Season runs October through June.
Model predictions for college basketball with team ratings, rankings, and context flags. Predictions for spread, moneyline, and totals. Season runs November through April.
More sports may be added in the future. Visit our Feature Requests page to suggest a sport you'd like to see covered.
